title: Section 6
content: 1 [(1) The jurisdiction of the University shall extend to the Cachar, Karimganj, North Cachar Hills, Karbi Anglong and Hailakandi Districts of the State of Assam.] (2) On and from the commencement of this Act, all Colleges situated in the districts of Cachar, Karimganj, North Cachar Hills 2 [, Karbi Anglong and Hailkandi] shall stand affiliated to the University. 3 * * * * *
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 25 of 1995, s. 2, for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 15-1-1994). 2. Subs. by s. 2, ibid., for "and Karbi Anglong" (w.e.f. 15-1-1994). 3. Sub-section (3) omitted by Act 25 of 1995, s. 2 (w.e.f.11-6-1995)
